title: Master v0.4.6 Manual Access Cleanup Target
notes:
Adds manual account/key cleanup fields so Master can delete accounts and revoke/delete temp keys without relying on card selection.

Changes:
- Adds Account username to delete field.
- Adds Temp key to revoke/delete field.
- Adds Delete Account by Username button.
- Adds Revoke Temp Key by Key button.
- Adds Delete Temp Key by Key button.
- Keeps existing selected-card cleanup panel.
- Keeps history entries.
- Keeps Discord alerts if webhook is enabled.
